elements.title: lang::report_page_031_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT MAX(kbi_ra.id)                             AS id,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       kbi_c.shortname,
       COUNT(distinct kbi_f.id)                   as forums,
       MAX(coalesce(kbi_d.discussions, 0))        AS discussions,
       MAX(coalesce(kbi_p.posts, 0))              AS posts,
       MAX(coalesce(d1.users_discussions, 0)) AS users_discussions,
       MAX(coalesce(p1.users_posts, 0))       AS users_posts,
       MAX(kbi_l.timespend)                       AS timespend,
       MAX(kbi_l.visits)                          AS visits
FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_ra.userid = kbi_u.id
       JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_ctx.instanceid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_forum kbi_f ON kbi_f.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = 'forum'
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.instance = kbi_f.id AND kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT course, COUNT(id) AS discussions FROM mdl_forum_discussions kbi_d GROUP BY course) d
         ON kbi_d.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_d.course, COUNT(kbi_p.id) AS posts
                  FROM mdl_forum_discussions kbi_d
                         JOIN mdl_forum_posts kbi_p ON kbi_p.discussion = kbi_d.id AND kbi_p.parent > 0
                  GROUP BY kbi_d.course) p ON kbi_p.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT COUNT(id) AS users_discussions, course, userid
                  FROM mdl_forum_discussions kbi_d
                  GROUP BY course, userid) d1 ON d1.course = kbi_c.id AND d1.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT COUNT(kbi_p.id) AS users_posts, kbi_d.course, kbi_p.userid
                  FROM mdl_forum_discussions kbi_d
                         JOIN mdl_forum_posts kbi_p ON kbi_p.discussion = kbi_d.id AND kbi_p.parent > 0
                  GROUP BY kbi_d.course, kbi_p.userid) p1 ON p1.course = kbi_c.id AND p1.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_l.userid, kbi_l.courseid, SUM(kbi_l.timespend) as timespend, SUM(kbi_l.visits) as visits
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_l, mdl_modules kbi_m, mdl_course_modules kbi_cm
                  WHERE kbi_l.page = 'module'
                    and kbi_m.name = 'forum'
                    AND kbi_cm.id = kbi_l.param
                    AND kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id
                  GROUP BY kbi_l.userid, kbi_l.courseid) l ON kbi_l.userid = kbi_u.id AND kbi_l.courseid = kbi_c.id
WHERE kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3
GROUP BY kbi_u.id, kbi_c.id, kbi_u.firstname, kbi_u.lastname, kbi_u.email, kbi_c.fullname, kbi_c.shortname
